title: Sales Process & Salesforce
summary: Salesforce-first workflow: leads, opportunities, forecasting, and integrations. Mirrors the SFDC training pack and Proposal Generator intro.

sections.heading: What to complete
sections.body: Work through Salesforce 101, opportunity financial concepts, and DocuSign integration. Use the video pack for structured learning; add Guidde later for click-path reinforcement.
